word: H5440 - סָבַךְ - çâbak - saw-bak' - Fold together

sections.paragraph:
Original: סבך

Transliteration: sâbak

Phonetic: saw-bak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to interweave
    1. (Qal)
      1. to interweave
      2. interwoven (participle)
    2. (Pual) to be interwoven

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1457

Part(s) of speech: Verb
